_meta.description: Trimmed, PINNED snapshot of the fields SoundPSA relies on from Tactical RMM's read API (the agent list/detail endpoint and the alerts poll endpoint). This is NOT a live dump — it is a best-effort pinned contract assembled from the field usage in app/Services/Tactical/* and the amidaware/tacticalrmm source, because this deployment has no live Tactical instance yet. It MUST be refreshed from a real `/api/schema/` (enable SWAGGER_ENABLED in Tactical, then GET <tactical>/api/schema/) before relying on it as an upstream-drift detector. See docs/INSTALL.md §9.
_meta.refreshed_at: 2026-06-15 (best-effort, never validated against a live instance)
_meta.refresh_command: Enable SWAGGER_ENABLED in Tactical, then: curl -s https://<tactical-host>/api/schema/ > tests/Fixtures/tactical/api_schema.json (then trim to the agent + alert schemas)

AgentTable.description: Fields returned by GET /agents/ (the list endpoint the daily sync consumes).

Alert.description: Fields returned by GET/PATCH /alerts/ (the hourly reconciliation poll).
